summary: Provision new EC2 Image Builder pipelines. Every stand-up routes to an engineer for review — recipes, infrastructure configurations, and day-2 operations land in a later wave.

operations.title: Provision a new EC2 Image Builder pipeline
operations.summary: Request a brand-new image pipeline; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Stand up a new image pipeline as a complete specification: the recipe and infrastructure it builds with, scanning, and an optional build schedule. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review.

params.name: pipeline_name
params.label: Pipeline name
params.help: Lower-case letters, numbers and dashes, like golden-al2023-pipeline. Names the pipeline in AWS and in the generated draft.

params.name: description
params.label: Description
params.help: Shown in the Image Builder console's pipeline list.

params.name: image_recipe_arn
params.label: Image recipe
params.help: The image recipe (base image plus build/test components) this pipeline builds from — an engineer picks the validated recipe during review.

params.name: infrastructure_configuration_arn
params.label: Infrastructure configuration
params.help: The build infrastructure (instance type, subnet, instance profile) this pipeline builds on — an engineer picks the validated configuration during review.

params.name: status
params.label: Status
params.help: DISABLED stops the pipeline from building until turned on.

params.name: image_scanning_enabled
params.label: Enable image scanning
params.help: Scans every built image for known vulnerabilities via Amazon Inspector.

params.name: schedule_expression
params.label: Build schedule
params.help: A cron expression for automatic rebuilds, e.g. cron(0 0 * * ? *) for daily at midnight UTC. Leave blank to build only on manual trigger.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this pipeline does
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this pipeline.

decisions: The image recipe and infrastructure configuration are prerequisite resources this catalog does not yet create — an engineer picks validated existing ones during review
A container recipe (building into ECR instead of an AMI), a distribution configuration, and cross-account/region distribution are engineer decisions
Additional workflows (build/test/distribution stage customization) beyond the recipe's defaults are an engineer follow-up
